description:
The 2 White stones are dead. Very dead indeed.
But can White get a tiny little ko threat out of it?
Black will not answer your first move so you can follow up on the threat.
sgf:
(;AB[sd]AB[rd]AB[qd]AB[oc]AB[nc]AW[rb]AW[pb]AB[nb]AB[pd]AB[mb]AB[ma]AB[pc]LB[md:NO]C[White is dead. But does White even have a ko threat here? In other words can you live if Black does not respond to your first move? Choose No if you cannot find a ko threat.FORCE]AP[goproblems]
